body: * **createInstantSearch:** remove the client from the Snapshot ([algolia/react-instantsearch#749](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/749)) ([9a8599d](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/9a8599d)) * refresh cache memory leak example ([algolia/react-instantsearch#784](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/784)) ([8b2de78](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/8b2de78)) * **stories:** rename InstantSearch to ([algolia/react-instantsearch#789](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/789)) ([5a6921a](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/5a6921a)) * InstantSearch root props ([algolia/react-instantsearch#770](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/770)) ([04dc300](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/04dc300))
